*** 1 FATAL, 1 INJ *** ESTIMATED 88MPH WINDS UPROOTED TREES, SNAPPED TREE TRUNKS, AND BROUGHT DOWN LARGE BRANCHES. ONE BRANCH STRUCK A CAMPER CAUSING FATAL INJURIES. SEVERAL RV TRAILERS WERE ROLLED, ONE WAS ROLLED 5 TIMES AND LANDED IN THE LAKE WITH AN OCCUPANT INSIDE WHO WAS INJURED.

*** 1 FATAL, 1 INJ *** UPDATED PREVIOUS REPORT WITH MORE INFORMATION ON FATALITY. ESTIMATED 88MPH WINDS UPROOTED TREES, SNAPPED TREE TRUNKS, AND BROUGHT DOWN LARGE BRANCHES. ONE PERSON SUFFERED A FATAL HEART ATTACK DURING THE STORM. SEVERAL RV TRAILERS WERE ROLLED, ONE WAS ROLLED 5 TIMES AND LANDED IN THE LAKE WITH AN OCCUPANT INSIDE WHO WAS INJURED.
*** 1 INJ *** ONE FOOT DIAMETER BRANCH DOWNED FROM HEALTHY TREE. WOODEN FENCE FLATTENED. CAMPERS ROLLED,THROWN INTO LAKE AT NEARBY CAMPSITE. LOCATION APPROXIMATE FOR INJURY.
